name: Jane & Gina | Got Milk?
description:
So when it comes to childhood friend stuff, everyone seems to love it, so why not go for an encore, eh? This time, two big titty tomboys! Two different flavors. A nerdy, athletic tomboy. Or am outgoing, gyaru tomboy?

Two of them loving to tease, joke, and play pranks. Their latest joke? Embarrassing you with their tits at every turn.

Do you just go with the joke and laugh? Do you perhaps go for the gropey grabby hands? Or will your boner pierce the heavens?

Art by Nesz:
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
